must_detect.matched_text: Employment note: affected contractor Mr. Aaron Teh (Octarine Cyber) suspended pending PDPA s.24 investigation; PD queries to dpo@harbourmeridian.sg; internal queries to sec_compliance@harbourmeridian.sg

Ms. Priya Kwan, Company Secretary; external counsel: Orchard Strand Law LLC (singapore@orchardstrand.law) for SGX continuous disclosure and PDPA advice
Summary: On 31 May 2026 a third-party contractor of Octarine Cyber Pte. Ltd. exposed a cloud share, allowing unauthorised download of one folder containing draft capital-markets and M&A materials
Content affected (not publicly available): (i) draft Sustainability-Linked Loan term sheet with margin grid, KPI thresholds, and covenant carve-outs; (ii) “Project Beryl” diligence pack for proposed acquisition of Sunwave Recycling Pte. Ltd.; (iii) internal minutes referencing DPT (crypto) treasury pilot metrics and MAS sandbox feedback
Cyber vector: compromised OAuth token on contractor laptop; 1 PDF and 3 XLSX files pulled via https://files.harbourmeridian.sg/d/l?doc=SLL-2 0 2 6-0 5; logs show IP 139.*.*.*; no persistence observed; keys rotated at 02:14 SGT
PDPA impact: limited to work emails and titles of 14 staff; no NRICs, no payroll; examples: e: a.kwan@harbourmeridian.sg; userId “E-9X3-7Q”; supplier contact list partially viewable with job roles only
Commercial sensitivity: ESG KPIs include Scope 1+2 cap at 4,900 tCO2e (FY26), step-up to 2.10% if exceeded, coupon ratchet tied to verified RE100 adoption by FY27; disclosure premature could affect pricing negotiations
Crypto/DPT sensitivity: minutes include provisional VAR limit for tokenised SGD pilot and non-public MAS sandbox comments on custodial segregation; circulate strictly on a need-to-know basis under SFA s.218/219
Controls: trading blackout imposed for designated insiders from 31 May–14 Jun 2026; information barriers reinforced—equities sales and research teams ring-fenced; insider list updated and stored in vault
Tipping/selective disclosure: any external queries to investorrelations@harbourmeridian.sg; do not discuss “Project Beryl,” DPT pilot, or SLL terms with unauthorised parties; all media responses routed to IR
Containment: Octarine Cyber revoked access; Harbour Meridian SOC rotated secrets and disabled affected tenant; no evidence of further exfiltration (>17MB); SGX RegCo to be notified if leakage indicates market impact
We do not believe a material adverse change has occurred; this note is not a profit forecast and should not be construed as guidance or commitment to any financing outcome
Operational notice (benign): join our monthly ESG academy webinar on sustainability-linked instruments; this training is educational and does not cover issuer-specific performance, trading, or deal-stage information
hr + it track: assign follow-ups to ict_ops board; due 04 jun; verify backups; update playbook; publish intranet phishing FAQ; status green, no escalation
Employment note: affected contractor Mr. Aaron Teh (Octarine Cyber) suspended pending PDPA s.24 investigation; PD queries to dpo@harbourmeridian.sg; internal queries to sec_compliance@harbourmeridian.sg
Public sources referenced for benchmarking only: MAS notices on DPT risk management and SGX practice notes on trading halts; none of our internal metrics or deal terms are in the public domain
Records: insider list v2.3 appended (redacted): K. Liew; P. Kwan; S. Rahman; timestamps 2 0 2 6-0 6-0 1
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation
